title: Pea Pesto Pasta
description: My Thermomix take on a Nigella-style pea pesto pasta — sweet, green and on the table in minutes.
intro: This is my independent Thermomix homage to Nigella Lawson and the comforting appeal of pea pesto pasta. It keeps the spirit of the original inspiration, but the method is written fresh for TM6 and TM7 cooks who want clear settings and a warm, achievable result.
steps: Add parmesan, pine nuts and garlic to the bowl, mill 8 sec / speed 8.
Add the peas, herbs, olive oil and salt. Blend 20 sec / speed 6 to a chunky pesto.
Toss through the cooked pasta with a splash of pasta water.
tips: A little pasta water makes it glossy and helps it coat.
Lovely cold as a pasta salad too.

faq.a: Cooked (or thawed frozen) — blanch fresh peas 2 minutes first.

faq.q: Is this the original Nigella Lawson recipe?
faq.a: No. This is Chef Aly’s independent Thermomix reinterpretation inspired by Nigella Lawson and pea pesto pasta; it is not endorsed by or affiliated with the chef.
